finding_results.notes: Compressed the Detroit follow-up call by removing the duplicated report/brochure and forms paraphrases. Kept Doug's admission that the built material fails, preserved Simone's 'I know' and the two-weeks deadline, and added a concrete operational consequence: Doug cannot turn the accidental road-material stretch into a repeatable set he can hand back to Layla or rehearse on purpose.
finding_results.summary: The closing call now advances from diagnosis to the practical problem of repeatability instead of re-explaining why the Detroit room responded.

summary: Revised chapter_14's closing call to preserve the must-land failure beats while compressing repeated explanation and sharpening the taping pressure around material Doug cannot deliberately reproduce.
